blueprint.expectation: Use the configured work location as the only mutable surface for {{targetProject}} blueprint-definition work. Never edit blueprint files from the shared repository checkout. Create or update the needed blueprint layer from that configured surface, then finalize using the configured merge steps.
blueprint.idlePrompt: If the blueprint work is complete, reply only with 'done: blueprint defined'. If you are truly blocked on missing user information, reply only with 'blocked: blueprint clarification required'. Otherwise resume the blueprint work immediately and make real progress instead of giving only a status update.

steps.title: Define and integrate the blueprint changes
Review relevant existing blueprints and Agentish sections
Create or update the needed blueprint layer
